prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the pose and action guide, replace the mannequin with a realistic adult female warrior in the same kneeling lunge pose, with one knee down, the other leg forward, the left hand clawed near the front knee, and one katana raised overhead in the right hand. Use REFERENCE_1 as the lighting, color, and environment guide: a dramatic golden-orange sunset beach scene with the sun behind the subject, glowing ocean reflections, wet sand, distant rocks, strong backlight, lens flare, and high-contrast cinematic warmth. Use REFERENCE_2 as the hair guide: long messy wet black hair, loose strands falling around the face and neck, damp texture. Add a practical beach-combat outfit: black asymmetrical crop top, tan wrap skirt shorts, and black strapped sandals. Keep the face obscured with a square privacy block like the references. Make the image photorealistic, full-body, vertical composition, with water and skin highlights emphasizing the sunset glow. The weapon count is exactly 1 katana.
